{{Quote|—until an anti-starfighter screening vessel is brought into service, every capital ship in the fleet is in imminent danger.|Admiral Ilon Drez|<ref name="ISB" />}}
'''Ilon Drez''' was a senior [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Drez led a group of vocal admirals who stressed the need for an anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] ship, believing that the lack of adequate screening [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] contributed to the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. [[Naval Command (Imperial)|Naval Command]] responded by creating the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]].<ref name="ISB" />
